title: On The Arms Of The Town Of Waterford[1]
content:
- URBS INTACTA MANET - semper intacta manebit,
        Tangere crabrones quis bene sanus amat?



    TRANSLATION

    A thistle is the Scottish arms,
    Which to the toucher threatens harms,
    What are the arms of Waterford,
    That no man touches - but a    -    - ?
meaning:
"On The Arms Of The Town Of Waterford[1]" is a quintessential example of Jonathan Swift's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
